title: Vacierite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vacierite''' was a substance, possibly an alloy or polymer used for armor plating.

The [[v-]], a unit used to rate the firepower of artillery weapons, was based on the energy needed to get a double-packed particle emission of 10<sup>24</sup> g2-ions in a coherent beam from a 400 cm by 8.5 cm rod of standard-purity vacierite.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
